title: Plan and implement a care and maintenance program for medicinal cannabis
training_package_name: Agriculture, Horticulture and Conservation and Land Management Training Package
competent_person_statement: A competent person in Plan and implement a care and maintenance program for medicinal cannabis demonstrates consistent performance across all elements and performance criteria in a workplace context.

elements.title: Determine care and maintenance requirements for medicinal cannabis plants

pcs.text: Identify and confirm cultivation specifications with senior personnel
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Identify and confirm cultivation specifications with senior personnel?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Identify and confirm cultivation specifications with senior personnel.

pcs.text: Determine plant care and maintenance requirements, including climate conditions for growing and flowering cycles
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Determine plant care and maintenance requirements, including climate conditions for growing and flowering cycles?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Determine plant care and maintenance requirements, including climate conditions for growing and flowering cycles.

pcs.text: Determine space requirements for the program, including any parameters that impact on required growing conditions
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Determine space requirements for the program, including any parameters that impact on required growing conditions?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Determine space requirements for the program, including any parameters that impact on required growing conditions.

pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Determine legal and regulatory considerations.

pcs.text: Identify labour, materials, tools and equipment needs for crop care and maintenance

pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Identify labour, materials, tools and equipment needs for crop care and maintenance.

pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Determine identification and quality specifications for medicinal cannabis plants during vegetative and flowering cycles.

pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Determine monitoring and treatment strategies to maintain health of medicinal cannabis plants.

pcs.text: Develop schedules for care and maintenance activities, including monitoring of plant health, water and nutrient requirements and environmental climate conditions

pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Develop schedules for care and maintenance activities, including monitoring of plant health, water and nutrient requirements and environmental climate conditions.

pcs.text: Identify hazards, assess risks and determine control limits, measures and corrective actions that ensure health and safety, hygiene, quality and security requirements
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Identify hazards, assess risks and determine control limits, measures and corrective actions that ensure health and safety, hygiene, quality and security requirements?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Identify hazards, assess risks and determine control limits, measures and corrective actions that ensure health and safety, hygiene, quality and security requirements.

pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Communicate plan and establish roles and responsibilities to all involved.
